github._role: Primary when CLAUDE_ISSUE_TRACKER=github (default). Disable issue_tracking capability if CLAUDE_ISSUE_TRACKER=clickup.

sonarqube._role: First-class quality gate: run before every PR merge decision via pr-health-check and pr-readiness skills

codecov._role: Optional: enable when coverage trend tracking is required for PR merge decisions. Used by qa-agent acceptance-validation and pr-readiness skills.

slack._note: [VERIFY IMAGE README] Confirm required env vars and runtime args at https://github.com/chisanan232/slack-mcp-server before enabling

clickup._note: [VERIFY IMAGE README] Confirm required env vars and runtime args at https://github.com/chisanan232/clickup-mcp-server before enabling
clickup._role: Enable when CLAUDE_ISSUE_TRACKER=clickup. Only one issue_tracking provider should be active at a time.

playwright._role: Used by qa-agent for UI acceptance testing — navigate pages, interact with elements via accessibility tree, capture snapshots. Enable for projects with a web UI. Browser: chrome by default; override with --browser firefox|webkit|msedge.
